name: test-gap
description: Analyze coverage reports to find untested functions and branches, then generate test skeleton recommendations.
intent_triggers: 找出哪些函式還沒被測到
檢查 Agent 修改的檔案測試夠不夠
找出風險最高的未測函式
find untested functions in my code
generate test skeletons for missing coverage
幫我跑測試並分析 coverage report

command.description: Subcommand: analyze, run, suggest, summary, risky

path.description: Coverage report file or source path

changed.description: Only analyze files modified by the Agent

cmd.description: Test command to run before analysis (run command)

output.description: Output file path for generated tests

top.description: Number of top risky functions to show (risky command)

examples.intent: 分析覆蓋率報告找出缺口
為未測函式生成測試骨架
